The '''Algarian Bureau of Planetary Information and Tourism''' was an administrative department under the ruling government of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Algarian]] and the [[Algarian system/Legends|Algarian system]] that oversaw the distribution of public information about the planet and the [[Star system/Legends|system]]. Without the submission of [[Form AA-23-7022]] and a 150 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] processing fee to this department, public information about Algarian and its system was restricted.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
